sections.paragraph:
verb לעדן

to refine, ennoble; indulge, delight

verb עודן

become refined, be ennobled; be indulged

verb להתעדן

become refined; to enjoy

verb לעדן (>>עידן)

to refine, ennoble; indulge, delight

masculine noun

pleasure; Eden; paradise

masculine noun עדן (>>עידן)

era, epoch, age

noun

Aden
